Cloud-based access control vendor. Supplies Kisi Controller Pro 2 (one per venue) and Kisi Reader Pro 2 (one per access-controlled door).

Kisi also charges an ongoing SaaS subscription per door — track these in `data/recurring-fees/`. Controller connects via Cat6 (10ft patch cable from switch).
